title: cinnamomum inunctum
intro: Cinnamomum inunctum, also known as the Sri Lankan cinnamon, is a plant species in the family Lauraceae, native to Sri Lanka. It possesses medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which contribute to its health benefits such as reducing blood pressure, improving digestion, and fighting against infections. The health benefits of Cinnamomum inunctum are attributed to its ability to modulate the immune system and protect against oxidative stress. The plant can be prepared into various herbal preparations, including infusions, decoctions, and essential oils, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
